title: glow-ores-vanilla-emissive
description: Ores glow in the dark using vanilla emissive block models — no OptiFine, no shaders, no mods. Not X-ray, server-safe.
body:
## Glow Ores

Ores glow in the dark. The ore part of each block — the ore chunks and their outline — emits light at full brightness, so you can spot and mine ores even in pitch-black caves. The surrounding stone, deepslate, and netherrack stay normally lit.

### No mods, no shaders, no OptiFine
The glow uses Minecraft's **native emissive block models** (1.21.2+). It works on pure vanilla Minecraft and is compatible with Sodium. Nothing extra to install.

### Not X-ray — server-safe
This does **not** let you see through blocks. It only makes ores you can already see easier to spot. Safe to use on servers.

### Covers all 18 ore types
Coal, iron, copper, gold, redstone, lapis, diamond, and emerald — each in overworld and deepslate form — plus nether gold and nether quartz.

### Installation
1. Download the latest file.
2. Place the `.zip` in your `resourcepacks` folder.
3. Enable it in **Settings → Resource Packs**.

### Supported version
Minecraft Java Edition 26.1.2 (resource pack format 84).
